---
title: "Restaurants"
description: "Restaurants near the conference venues."
date: 2026-04-05
categories: [restaurant]
---

## Some restaurants near the conference venue
- [Area Four](https://www.areafour.com/), some vegeterian and gluten-free options
- [Beantown Taqueria](https://beantowntaq.com/)
- [CAVA](https://cava.com/locations/kendall-square-ma)
- [Eastern Edge](https://www.easternedgefoodhall.com/), food court with several different restaurants
- [Flour Bakery + Cafe](https://www.flourbakery.com/)
- [Life Alive](https://www.lifealive.com/location/central-square), many VG/GF options
- [Saloniki](https://www.salonikigreek.com/), some VG/GF options
